user.title: Toniebox Cloud Login
user.description:
Enter your Toniebox / Boxine account credentials.
Your data is only used to communicate with the official Toniebox cloud (api.tonie.cloud).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Toniebox
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please enter your credentials again.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Toniebox cloud. Please check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This Toniebox account is already configured.

clear_chapters.name: Clear Chapters
clear_chapters.description: Remove all chapters from a Creative Tonie.

entity_id.name: Creative Tonie
entity_id.description: The media_player entity of the target creative tonie.

sort_chapters.name: Sort Chapters
sort_chapters.description: Sort the chapters on a Creative Tonie.

entity_id.name: Creative Tonie
entity_id.description: The media_player entity of the target creative tonie.

sort_by.name: Sort By
sort_by.description: Sort chapters by: title, filename, or date.

remove_chapter.name: Remove Chapter
remove_chapter.description: Remove a single chapter by its ID.

entity_id.name: Creative Tonie
entity_id.description: The media_player entity of the target creative tonie.

chapter_id.name: Chapter ID
chapter_id.description: The ID of the chapter to remove (from the 'chapters' attribute).

move_chapter.name: Move Chapter
move_chapter.description: Move a chapter one position up or down.

entity_id.name: Creative Tonie
entity_id.description: The media_player entity of the target creative tonie.

chapter_id.name: Chapter ID
chapter_id.description: The ID of the chapter to move.

direction.name: Direction
direction.description: 'up' moves earlier, 'down' moves later in the list.

upload_audio.name: Upload Audio
upload_audio.description: Upload a local audio file as a new chapter to a Creative Tonie. Supported formats: mp3, ogg, wav, flac, m4a, aac, opus.

entity_id.name: Creative Tonie
entity_id.description: The media_player entity of the target creative tonie.

file_path.name: File Path
file_path.description: Absolute path to the audio file on the HA host (e.g. /config/tonie_audio/story.mp3).

title.name: Chapter Title
title.description: Title shown for this chapter. Defaults to the filename without extension.

entity_id.name: Creative Tonie
entity_id.description: The media_player entity of the target creative tonie.

name.name: New Name
name.description: The new name for the tonie.

entity_id.name: Toniebox
entity_id.description: The media_player entity of the toniebox.

name.name: New Name
name.description: The new name for the toniebox.

redeem_content_token.name: Redeem Content Token
redeem_content_token.description: Redeem a free content token onto a Creative Tonie.

entity_id.name: Creative Tonie
entity_id.description: The media_player entity of the target creative tonie.

apply_tune.name: Apply Tune
apply_tune.description: Apply a purchased Tune to a Tonie.

tune_id.name: Tune ID
tune_id.description: The ID of the tune to apply.

remove_tune.name: Remove Tune
remove_tune.description: Remove the active Tune from a Tonie (restores original content).

invitation_id.name: Invitation ID
invitation_id.description: The ID of the invitation (from the 'Pending Invitations' sensor).
